failure.error_msg: [ERROR] Counter value mismatch: read 20, expected 10 assert 20 == 10 + where 10 = int(LogicArray('0000000000001010', Range(15, 'downto', 0))) + where LogicArray('0000000000001010', Range(15, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(ttc_counter_lite.count).value + where LogicArrayObject(ttc_counter_lite.count) = HierarchyObject(ttc_counter_lite).count
